title: NVIDIA Brings Trusted, 24/7 AI Agents to Telecom Operations
summary: Telecom operators have seen remarkable returns from using generative AI to automate network management, customer care and back-office operations. Most of that impact has been task‑based: automation that speeds up predetermined steps while people manually correlate insights and direct next steps. Aut
